# Omnilint CLI
### Website
[https://omnilint.com](https://omnilint.com)
### Installation
Install Omnilint in your devDependencies (recommanded):
```sh
$ cd YOUR_REPO
$ npm install --save-dev omnilint
```
For global installation:
```sh
$ npm install -g omnilint
```
### Sign Up
Create your free Omnilint account:
```sh
$ omnilint signup
Enter an username: YOUR_USERNAME
Enter an email: YOUR_EMAIL
Enter a password: YOUR_PASSWORD
Omnilint account created successfully.
```
### Log In
Log in with your existing Omnilint account:
```sh
$ omnilint login
Username or email: YOUR_USERNAME_OR_EMAIL
Password: YOUR_PASSWORD
Authentication successful.
```
### Version
Print the CLI version:
```sh
$ omnilint version
```
### Help
Print the list of available commands:
```sh
$ omnilint
  Commands:
    version                                 Print Omnilint version.
    install                                 Install Omnilint
    uninstall                               Uninstall Omnilint
    ...                                     ...
```
